reviews.review_description: This is very well made , Awesome graphics and well worth the price! Very long spooky ride that even turns into a relaxing boat ride :) A JOB WELL DONE AND RUNS SMOOTH NO GLITCHES
Very disappointed. Loaded ok, but will not open. I have plenty of room on my phone and always close everthing, and optimise, before going into VR. Will need to seek a refund.
This is by far my favorite vr coaster. It's amazing and different. It takes you through so many different worlds. Way more than I expected for the money. If you love coasters, get this one.
The best rollercoaster / journey experience on GO. Blistering frame rates, and wonderful graphics. Really well done. I can't wait for more.
This a awesome coaster experience and the graphics are great. like to see more from this developer. highly recommended.

It's a ride, not so much a thrill ride. It's really well done and everything looks pretty good but I'm missing the thrilling aspect of a roller coaster. There are a few drops and turns that are cool but not nearly enough. Great to show to people but I don't see the point of riding this more than a couple of times. Also the sound could be improved, it's not present enough.

This rollercoaster app puts the rest to SHAME! By leaps and bounds -- So very creative the graphics superb lots of content this ride won't can't ever become boring---so very well done to its makers __ This may well be the last word in rollercoaster app---only one question--- what other apps do you genius artist have available  for purchase?

Rollercoasters seem like such a natural fit for VR, yet they're rarely done well. This one is , by far, the best I've tried on Oculus Go. It gives a great sense of speed and the graphics are fantastic. Mid way into the ride it turns into a relaxing boat ride before getting back to the tracks for a speedy finish. The ride is really long for a VR rollercoaster. I felt like I got more than my money's worth. It's not too scary, but very trippy and psychedelic. I would highly recommend this, especially to those that have tried other VR rollercoasters and have been disappointed. I hope to see more VR experiences from this developer.

This is my favorite roller coaster app due to the alternating periods of speed and calm.  I used to ride it every day but now I've purchased a Quest.  Developers, please make this app for the quest!  I would have given it 5 stars if it was also available on the quest.
This is a great coaster experience, definitely one of the better ones. The sound of the coaster can be improved though

I’ve said numerous times in the past that the market for coasters is so over saturated, that developers need to differentiate their work early on in the concept phase in order to stand out. That’s exactly the challenge that the team responsible for Ghost Mountain Roller Coaster embraced. Virtual reality can be so much more than just a heightened sense of emulated reality; it has the potential to bring the imagination to life. Developers with less creativity would have simply adopted the “mine cart in the dark” trope and left it at that. But this group decided that would just be the surface. There are moments of adrenaline and moments of zen calm. A cavernous roller coaster excursion in the dark gives  way to an unexpected boat ride through a hypnotic lake of glowing lights. Not to mention, this ride is LONG. I feel as though this length is not just a financial objective to provide value, but also an artistic choice. The psychological undertones of this ride are underscored by its depths. All of this highlights why this title stands out in a big way: this ride is not your typical carnival ride, but is a rather mind-bending epic trip through the psyche.

I have rode this coaster at least 10 times and I will continue to. Sure there are a couple of things that annoy me... Subpar graphics coexisting with wonderful ones etc. But overall... This is the best one I have ridden. It's a long ride with truly zen moments.

reviews.review_title: One of the Best Coaster Rides
reviews.review_description: I love my coaster rides in VR and ive seen alot. But this one is one of the best. It gives you the feel of speed with that empty gut feeling you get on real coaster. It give you time to look at everything and its a long ride for a coaster ride. I wish you could recommend apps to friends..
